prompt: A document review flow: pick a client, look through their uploaded documents, and verify or reject each one with a note to the client.
wire:
export default function DocumentReviewFlow() { const [clients, setClients] = useState([]); const [clientId, setClientId] = useState(""); const [client, setClient] = useState(null); const [docs, setDocs] = useState([]); const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false); const [docsLoading, setDocsLoading] = useState(false); const [actionState, setActionState] = useState({}); // docId -> {phase, reason, showReason} useEffect(() => { tools.host_listClients({}).then((r) => setClients(r.data || [])); }, []); useEffect(() => { if (!clientId) { setClient(null); setDocs([]); return; } setDocsLoading(true); Promise.all([ tools.host_getClient({ id: clientId }), tools.host_listClientDocuments({ id: clientId }), ]).then(([c, d]) => { setClient(c); const reviewable = (d.data || []).filter(doc => doc.status === "received" || doc.status === "needs_review"); setDocs(reviewable); setDocsLoading(false); }); }, [clientId]); const initAction = (docId, type) => { setActionState(prev => ({ ...prev, [docId]: { phase: "idle", reason: "", showReason: type === "reject", pendingAction: type } })); }; const setReason = (docId, val) => { setActionState(prev => ({ ...prev, [docId]: { ...prev[docId], reason: val } })); }; const submit = async (doc, action) => { const state = actionState[doc.id] || {}; setActionState(prev => ({ ...prev, [doc.id]: { ...prev[doc.id], phase: "sending" } })); const result = await tools.host_setDocumentStatus({ id: clientId, docId: doc.id, body: { action, fileName: doc.fileName || doc.file_name || "", reason: state.reason || "", } }); const nextPhase = result && result.status === "pending-approval" ? "awaiting" : action === "verify" ? "verified" : "rejected"; setActionState(prev => ({ ...prev, [doc.id]: { ...prev[doc.id], phase: nextPhase } })); }; const cancel = (docId) => { setActionState(prev => { const n = { ...prev }; delete n[docId]; return n; }); }; const statusColor = (s) => ({ received: "var(--vendo-color-accent)", needs_review: "#b07a00", verified: "#2a7a4b", rejected: "var(--vendo-color-danger)", }[s] || "var(--vendo-color-muted)"); const statusLabel = (s) => ({ received: "Received", needs_review: "Needs review", verified: "Verified", rejected: "Rejected", }[s] || s); const reviewableDocs = docs; return (
{/* Client picker */}

Filing deadline
)}
)} {/* Document list */} {clientId && docsLoading && (
Loading documents…
)} {clientId && !docsLoading && reviewableDocs.length === 0 && (
No documents awaiting review for this client.
)} {!docsLoading && reviewableDocs.map(doc => { const state = actionState[doc.id] || {}; const phase = state.phase; const isDone = phase === "verified" || phase === "rejected" || phase === "awaiting"; return (
{doc.name || doc.documentType || "Document"}
{doc.fileName && (
📎 {doc.fileName}
)} {doc.uploadedAt && (
Uploaded {new Date(doc.uploadedAt).toLocaleDateString("en-US", { month: "short", day: "numeric", year: "numeric" })}
)}
{statusLabel(doc.status)}
{/* Done states */} {phase === "awaiting" && (
Awaiting your approval…
)} {phase === "verified" && (
✓ Marked as verified
)} {phase === "rejected" && (
✗ Returned to client with note
)} {/* Action buttons — idle, no pending action chosen */} {!isDone && !state.pendingAction && (
)} {/* Verify confirmation */} {!isDone && state.pendingAction === "verify" && (
Confirm this document is correct and complete.
